scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.apk: node scripts/ensure-public-img.mjs && npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.apk:build: node scripts/ensure-public-img.mjs && npm run build && cap sync android && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: node scripts/ensure-public-img.mjs && npm run build && cap sync android && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs assembleRelease
